title: Schauwerk optimization and live-gate hardening
goal: Bring Schauwerk from foundation plus Miro-pilot into a clearer, safer next stage: current docs, controlled SW-003 live proof preparation, and cleaner receipt validation before any broader live apply path is opened.

metadata.source_request: erstelle eine to do liste, registriere diese im bureau und arbeite sie ab
metadata.open_gate: heimgewebe/schauwerk#8 SW-003: Isolated Miro write proof

completion: Schauwerk documentation reflects the current SW-003 local live-gate receipt chain without claiming live acceptance.
A controlled non-mutating SW-003 live proof plan exists before any live mutation is attempted.
Receipt validation and evidence packaging are improved while SW-003 Issue #8 and SW-009 live apply remain gated.
